description: Bank account statement — extract account details, period, balances, and transactions

fields.name: bank_name
fields.prompt: Extract the name of the bank or financial institution that issued this statement.

fields.name: account_holder
fields.prompt: Extract the account holder's full name or business name.

fields.name: statement_period_start
fields.prompt: Extract the statement period start date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: statement_period_end
fields.prompt: Extract the statement period end date in ISO 8601 format (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: currency
fields.prompt: Extract the 3-letter ISO 4217 currency code for this account (e.g. GBP, USD, EUR).

fields.name: opening_balance
fields.prompt: Extract the opening balance at the start of the statement period as a plain number. Negative if overdrawn.

fields.name: closing_balance
fields.prompt: Extract the closing balance at the end of the statement period as a plain number. Negative if overdrawn.

fields.name: total_credits
fields.prompt: Extract the total credits (money in) for the period as a plain number. Return null if not summarised.

fields.name: total_debits
fields.prompt: Extract the total debits (money out) for the period as a plain number. Return null if not summarised.

fields.name: transactions
fields.prompt: Extract all transactions as a JSON array. Each item: {date (YYYY-MM-DD), description, credit, debit, balance}. Use null for absent fields. Limit to 100 if very long.
